compiled_state.title: [075a-b781] RED: Write unit tests for migrate-comment-refs.py covering all 4 comment categories
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Story: 075a-b781

## What to do
Create tests/scripts/test-migrate-comment-refs.py with failing (RED) unit tests for the migrate-comment-refs.py script before the script exists.

## Tests to write
- test_rewrite_header_comment: input '# plugins/dso/scripts/foo.sh' → output '# foo.sh'
- test_rewrite_usage_comment: input '# Usage: .claude/scripts/dso foo.sh' → output '# Usage: ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/foo.sh'
- test_rewrite_path_anchor: input line with 'See plugins/dso/docs/X.md' → replaces with '${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/docs/X.md'
- test_rewrite_cross_ref: inline prose reference 'plugins/dso/hooks/' → '${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/'
- test_dry_run_no_mutation: --dry-run flag must not modify any files
- test_idempotent: running the script twice produces same result as once

## Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-migrate-comment-refs.py

## testing_mode: RED
All tests must FAIL before migrate-comment-refs.py exists (ModuleNotFoundError or ImportError is acceptable as RED).
